name: Sony PlayStation 3

bios.notes: RPCS3 requires user-provided PS3 firmware installed into the emulator, not stored in ROM-library metadata.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: game folder, disc image, or installed emulator entry

notes: Treat PS3 firmware, installed packages, licenses, and emulator state as user-managed sensitive/runtime data.
Path audits are not compatibility audits for RPCS3.
